title: Regency Centers Invites You to Join Its Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Sept. 29, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (The “Company”) (NASDAQ: REG) will announce its Third Quarter 2023 earnings results on Thursday, November 2, 2023, after the market closes. The Company's earnings release and supplemental information package will be posted on the Investor Relations section of the Company's website – investors.regencycenters.com . The Company will host an earnings conference call on Friday, November 3, 2023, at 11:00 a.m. ET.

title: Regency Centers (REG) Up 10% in 6 Months: Will the Trend Last?
text: Regency (REG) is poised to benefit from its high-quality open-air shopping center portfolio and focus on necessity, service, convenience and value retailers serving the essential needs of communities.

title: Regency Centers: Unlock Value In This Prime Time REIT
text: Regency Centers is a shopping center REIT with a high-quality portfolio of primarily grocery-anchored properties. The company has exhibited strong portfolio stats and a consistently high leased rate. The recent acquisition of Urstadt Biddle Properties is expected to result in synergies and contribute to future growth for Regency Centers.

title: Regency Centers to Present at the BofA Securities 2023 Global Real Estate Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Sept. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) today announced that Mike Mas, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to make a presentation at the 2023 BofA Securities 2023 Global Real Estate Conference (the “Conference”) on Wednesday, September 13, 2023, at 2:10 pm ET. To access the Company's live presentation, use the webcast registration link below.
